headline: Asus’ top-end 4K QD-OLED gaming monitor is $400 off
summary: Asus ROG Swift 32-inch 4K QD-OLED monitor is on sale. It features a high-end QD-OLED panel for superior visuals. Get it for $899.99, a $400 discount from its usual price.

headline: Samsung's redesigned Z Fold 8 with a wide display just leaked
summary: Images of Samsung's Galaxy Z Fold 8 have leaked online. The redesign reveals a shorter, wider foldable display. Leaks include some specs, days before the official July 22nd launch.

headline: Is America ready for this quirky Jeep-looking EV that can park itself?
summary: A new Jeep-looking EV with self-parking capabilities is emerging. It joins a growing trend of quirky, smaller electric vehicles. Microcar sales are still low in the US, but interest is rising.

headline: Florida man arrested for allegedly stealing over $200,000 in crypto using Steam game malware
summary: A Florida man was arrested for stealing $220,000 in cryptocurrency. He allegedly used malware embedded in Steam games to infect systems. The scheme ran from May 2024 to February 2026, compromising 8,000 accounts.

headline: Kill Bill: The Whole Bloody Affair on 4K Is Out Soon – Here’s Where You Can Still Preorder It
summary: “Kill Bill: The Whole Bloody Affair” is coming to 4K. Preorders are currently available for the upcoming release. The 4K version is set to release on July 28.

headline: King of the Hill Season 15 Review
summary: Hulu's “King of the Hill” revival delivers a profound Season 15. The new season expertly weaves in callbacks for fans. It addresses questions from the 16-year hiatus since the last season.

headline: Riftbound: Vendetta Hands-On Preview: Zed vs. Shen Showdown Deck and New Keywords
summary: Hands-on preview of Riftbound: Vendetta's Zed vs. Shen Showdown decks. New game mechanics and keywords like Empower, Burn, and Flow were discussed. Insights provided by Riftbound game designer Jon Moormann.

headline: Should We Fear Consoles Going All-Digital, or Does the PC Status Quo Prove It Works?
summary: Debate over consoles transitioning to an all-digital future. PC gaming has successfully been digital-only for years via platforms like Steam. PlayStation owners are advised to be wary of losing physical disc options.

headline: Burnham finalising cabinet ahead of becoming PM on Monday
summary: Burnham is preparing to become Prime Minister on Monday. He is currently finalizing his cabinet appointments. The new Labour leader promises major changes in British politics.

headline: Zeffman: Burnham promises huge change - but leaves questions about plan to deliver it
summary: New Labour leader Burnham pledges the biggest political change in 40 years. His first speech as leader emphasized this ambitious goal. However, details on how to deliver this change remain unclear.

headline: Mother of Henry Nowak killer jailed for removing knife from murder scene
summary: Kiran Kaur was jailed for obstructing justice. She removed the knife used in the murder of student Henry Nowak. Her actions were an attempt to hide evidence from the crime scene.

headline: Boy attacked by zoo crocodile has had seven operations and is smiling again, say parents
summary: A three-year-old boy, attacked by a zoo crocodile, is recovering. He has undergone seven operations within a month. His parents report he is making good progress and smiling again.
